text: So you want the last piece of pizza? Oh, you want orders, okay? I'm glad CL asked for the last piece. It's the last piece. This last piece, yeah. He didn't ask. No, I offered it to him. I said, Do you want the last piece? He said, Yeah. You didn't tell me. I just did it right now. I was already planning on not eating it. Okay. Ashton. Ashton. Try to figure out how it works, I guess. Ashton, Ashton. Cute baby boy.
